'''nazanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jibbah|jibbah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jibbah|jibbah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nazanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzængæth|næzængæth]] || [[word:næzængæj|næzængæj]] || [[word:næzængæsh|næzængæsh]] || [[word:næzængæ|næzængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazazangath|nazazangath]] || [[word:nazazangaj|nazazangaj]] || [[word:nazazangash|nazazangash]] || [[word:nazazanga|nazazanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazangath|nazangath]] || [[word:nazangaj|nazangaj]] || [[word:nazangash|nazangash]] || [[word:nazanga|nazanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazafngath|nazafngath]] || [[word:nazafngaj|nazafngaj]] || [[word:nazafngash|nazafngash]] || [[word:nazafngaf|nazafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazangatha|nazangatha]] || [[word:nazangaja|nazangaja]] || [[word:nazangasha|nazangasha]] || [[word:nazangaka|nazangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazangath|nazangath]] || [[word:nazangaj|nazangaj]] || [[word:nazangash|nazangash]] || [[word:nazanga|nazanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazangathal|nazangathal]] || [[word:nazangajal|nazangajal]] || [[word:nazangashal|nazangashal]] || [[word:nazangakal|nazangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazangathatha|nazangathatha]] || [[word:nazangajaja|nazangajaja]] || [[word:nazangashasha|nazangashasha]] || [[word:nazangaka|nazangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazangathan|nazangathan]] || [[word:nazangajan|nazangajan]] || [[word:nazangashan|nazangashan]] || [[word:nazangakan|nazangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazangathaoro|nazangathaoro]] || [[word:nazangajaoro|nazangajaoro]] || [[word:nazangashaoro|nazangashaoro]] || [[word:nazangakaoro|nazangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
